SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2008 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO OCT-23-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT, DEFENDANT TO PAY $100 PER MONTH STARTING AUG. 1, 2008 DUE ON THE 7TH DAY OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2008 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF REQUEST THAT DEFENDANT BRING IN FINANCIAL STATEMENTS.
BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2008; JUDGMENT DEBTOR JOHNSON, ROOSEVELT FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEHRIZA, ALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROOSEVELT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $297.78 ACCRUED INTEREST, $122.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROOSEVELT
MEMORANDUM OF COST AFTER JUDGMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF CREDIT, AND DECLARATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST RECEIVED 5/31/07, HELD 10 DAYS, ENTERED TODAY.
EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON INSTALLMENT PAYMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MEHRIZA, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROOSEVELT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
